sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ATIF Holdings Limited Announces Strategic Diversification to Bitcoin Business
feed.summary: ATIF Holdings Limited has announced a five-year strategic plan to diversify its business into Bitcoin. The company aims to acquire 1,000 BTC through direct purchases and mining operations, with a focus on establishing energy-efficient mining facilities in West Texas due to its favorable regulatory environment and cost-effective energy resources. This move is intended to position Bitcoin as a key strategic asset for growth and diversification for ATIF Holdings.

feed.title: PLDT expands high-speed internet in Rizal
feed.summary: PLDT Inc. is expanding its high-speed internet coverage in Rizal through the activation of its air-laser technology, which enables data transmission across long distances without physical cables. This Google Taara-developed technology, capable of delivering up to 20 gigabits per second, aims to provide reliable digital access to traditionally underserved and remote communities. The company's investment in these network upgrades reflects its commitment to bridging the digital divide.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Purchases 3,991,896 Shares of Welltower Inc. $WELL
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. significantly increased its stake in Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL) by purchasing nearly 4 million additional shares, bringing its total ownership to 13.08% valued at approximately $15.99 billion. This move comes as analysts have a generally positive outlook on Welltower, assigning a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $210.21. Welltower also reported strong financial results, beating quarterly EPS estimates, experiencing a 41.3% year-over-year revenue increase, and announcing a quarterly dividend of $0.74.

feed.title: MCDONALDS : Buy rating from DZ Bank
feed.summary: DZ Bank analyst Katharina Schmenger has maintained a Buy rating on McDonald's Corporation stock. This recommendation was published on February 16, 2026, at 06:50 am EST. The report from MarketScreener with dpa-AFX Analyser highlights the ongoing positive outlook for the fast-food giant.

feed.title: TimesSquare Capital Management LLC Sells 142,861 Shares of Gartner, Inc. $IT
feed.summary: TimesSquare Capital Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Gartner, Inc. by selling 142,861 shares, representing a 64.4% decrease in its holdings. This transaction leaves the firm with 79,023 shares valued at approximately $20.8 million. Concurrently, Gartner's Director Stephen G. Pagliuca made a substantial insider purchase of 43,300 shares worth nearly $9.94 million, while the company reported strong Q earnings, beating consensus estimates, and provided positive FY26 guidance.

feed.title: Todd Asset Management LLC Purchases 72,143 Shares of The Kroger Co. $KR
feed.summary: Todd Asset Management LLC increased its stake in The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) by 7.7%, bringing its total holdings to 1,010,556 shares valued at approximately $68.1 million. Other institutional investors like Norges Bank and Allianz Asset Management GmbH have also significantly increased their positions in Kroger, with institutional investors now owning 80.93% of the company's stock. Kroger recently beat quarterly EPS estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.35 per share, representing an annualized dividend of $1.40 and a yield of 2.0%.

feed.title: After Earnings, Is Alphabet Stock a Buy, a Sell, or Fairly Valued?
feed.summary: Alphabet reported strong fiscal Q4 earnings, with sales up 18% and Google Cloud showing significant growth, reaffirming its position as an AI leader. Morningstar maintains a fair value estimate of $340 per share, supported by a wide economic moat and strong financial health despite ongoing antitrust scrutiny and substantial AI investments. The article concludes that Alphabet's stock is currently fairly valued, highlighting its full-stack AI strategy as a key strength.

feed.title: Brown & Brown Appoints New Chief Information Officer
feed.summary: Brown & Brown has appointed Dorothea Henderson as its new Chief Information Officer, effective February 23. Henderson will be responsible for leading the company's enterprise technology strategy, digital transformation, and strengthening system reliability and security. Her previous experience as Chief Digital Information Officer at CareFirst BlueCross BlueShield is expected to enhance Brown & Brown's technology integration capabilities and help build a world-class technology team.

feed.title: Bio-Techne's Ella Platform Receives CE-IVD Marking
feed.summary: Bio-Techne's Ella platform has secured CE-IVD marking, enabling its sale and use in the EU for precision diagnostics. This platform provides rapid, accurate biomarker results in under 90 minutes, supporting clinical decision-making and compatible with over 390 analytes across neuroscience, immunology, and oncology. The certification reinforces Bio-Techne's commitment to advancing precision medicine through reliable and standardized biomarker detection solutions.

feed.title: Ford CEO Jim Farley, Trump officials reportedly discussed U.S.-China carmaking joint ventures
feed.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley and Trump administration officials recently discussed potential joint ventures between Chinese carmakers and U.S. companies. These ventures would involve American firms holding a controlling stake. The discussions suggest a strategic approach to U.S.-China automotive partnerships.

feed.title: Gilead strikes $1.5 billion cancer pact with Genhouse Bio
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences has entered into a global licensing deal with China's Genhouse Bio for its synthetic lethal cancer candidate GH31, worth up to $1.5 billion. Gilead will pay an $80 million upfront fee for exclusive worldwide rights, with Genhouse Bio eligible for significant development, regulatory, and commercial milestones, plus tiered royalties. GH31 is a biomarker-driven MAT2A inhibitor that has secured IND clearance in the US and China, enabling immediate clinical development, and Gilead will manage all global responsibilities.

feed.title: COTERRA ENERGY INC (NYSE:CTRA) Emerges as a Prime GARP Selection
feed.summary: Coterra Energy Inc. (NYSE:CTRA) is presented as a strong Growth at a Reasonable Price (GARP) candidate due to its robust growth metrics, reasonable valuation, and solid financial health. The company exhibits double-digit revenue and EPS growth, with analysts projecting continued expansion, and its price multiples are attractive compared to both the broader market and its industry peers. Despite some liquidity concerns, Coterra's high profitability margins and manageable debt contribute to its appeal for GARP investors seeking quality growth without overpaying.

feed.title: D-Fend Solutions Named Top-Funded Startup in 2025 Gartner Emerging Tech for Cyber Electronic Defense
feed.summary: D-Fend Solutions, a leader in RF cyber-driven counter-drone technology, has been recognized by Gartner as a top-funded startup in Cyber Electronic Defense (CED) for 2025. Gartner emphasizes the importance of non-kinetic, high-precision C-UAS solutions that avoid collateral damage and disruption to legitimate communications. The report highlights significant commercial investment in drone detection and mitigation, focusing on scalable, non-kinetic solutions suitable for urban and sensitive environments, with D-Fend Solutions exemplifying this trend.

feed.title: Todd Asset Management LLC Boosts Stake in Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. $HII
feed.summary: Todd Asset Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII) by 21.2% in the third quarter, now holding 127,329 shares valued at $36.66 million. This boost comes as HII reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.38 per share. Despite some insider selling, institutional investors maintain a substantial ownership in the company, with analysts generally assigning a "Hold" rating.

feed.title: Blackstone helps Indian AI company Neysa with funding
feed.summary: Disruptive equity firm Blackstone has invested in Indian AI infrastructure startup Neysa, which is seeking $1.2 billion in funding. Blackstone and Nexus Venture Partners have committed $600 million, with the remaining $600 million to be acquired through debt. Neysa plans to use the funds to expand its GPU computational power services, offering cheaper alternatives to broad cloud providers like Microsoft Azure, as India's AI sector sees significant growth.

feed.title: Brown & Brown brings in Dori Henderson to lead data, AI and digital push
feed.summary: Brown & Brown Inc. has appointed Dorothea “Dori” Henderson as its new chief information technology officer, effective February 23, 2026. Based in Daytona Beach, Florida, Henderson will spearhead the company's enterprise technology strategy, data and AI initiatives, system reliability, security, and digital transformation efforts. Her role will also involve supporting technology integration for acquisitions and enhancing teammate tools and customer experiences, leveraging her previous experience at CareFirst BlueCross BlueShield and Collins Aerospace.

feed.title: Bio-Techne's Ella Platform Achieves CE-IVD Marking Expanding Access to Rapid, Cartridge‑Based Immunoassays for European Clinical Laboratories
feed.summary: Bio-Techne's Ella immunoassay platform has received CE-IVD marking, enabling its sale and use in the European Union for clinical laboratories. This compact, cartridge-based system provides rapid, reproducible biomarker results in under 90 minutes. The certification allows hospitals and labs to use Ella for in-house test development, clinical trials, and other translational activities, enhancing precision diagnostics.

feed.title: Bio-Techne's Ella Platform Achieves CE-IVD Marking Expanding Access to Rapid, Cartridge‑Based Immunoassays for European Clinical Laboratories
feed.summary: Bio-Techne's Ella benchtop immunoassay platform has received CE-IVD marking, allowing its sale and use in clinical laboratories across the European Union. This certification enables hospitals and labs to utilize Ella for in-house test development and clinical trials, providing rapid, cartridge-based biomarker results in under 90 minutes. While the Ella platform is CE-IVD marked, its Simple Plex assays remain for research use only, requiring developers to build specific clinical applications on the validated system.

feed.title: Public Sector Pension Investment Board Raises Stock Holdings in FormFactor, Inc. $FORM
feed.summary: The Public Sector Pension Investment Board increased its stake in FormFactor (NASDAQ:FORM) by 14.5% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 300,744 shares valued at approximately $10.95 million. This increase comes as FormFactor exceeded earnings expectations, reporting $0.46 EPS against an anticipated $0.35, and $215.16 million in revenue, a 13.6% year-over-year increase. Despite insider selling, analysts have raised price targets and shifted ratings towards "buy" or "hold," with a consensus price target of $80.91.

feed.title: Why Welltower (WELL) Is Up 6.8% After Decade-High FFO And 2026 Earnings Outlook Shift
feed.summary: Welltower Inc. reported decade-high revenue, EBITDA, and FFO growth for the period ending December 31, 2025, leading to a 6.8% stock increase. The company's 2026 earnings guidance projects higher net income attributable to common stockholders, driven by a strategic focus on senior housing and technology-enabled operations. While the strong outlook reinforces the company's investment narrative, potential risks from rising interest rates and market imbalances are still present.

feed.title: State of New Jersey Common Pension Fund D Buys 13,181 Shares of Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS
feed.summary: The State of New Jersey Common Pension Fund D increased its stake in Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ:SNPS) by 25.6% during the third quarter, acquiring an additional 13,181 shares. This brings their total holdings to 64,750 shares, valued at $31,947,000. Other institutional investors like Norges Bank, Ameriprise Financial Inc., and Massachusetts Financial Services Co. MA also significantly adjusted their positions in the semiconductor company.

feed.title: Binance and Franklin Templeton Advance Strategic Collaboration with Institutional Collateral Program
feed.summary: Binance and Franklin Templeton have launched a new institutional off-exchange collateral program, allowing eligible clients to use tokenized money market fund shares as collateral when trading on Binance. This initiative aims to make digital markets more secure and capital-efficient for institutional traders. The program alleviates the need to park assets directly on an exchange, reducing counterparty risk and enabling institutions to earn yield while maintaining regulated, off-exchange custody of their assets, supported by Ceffu.

feed.title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated $VRTX Stake Increased by State of New Jersey Common Pension Fund D
feed.summary: State of New Jersey Common Pension Fund D increased its stake in Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:VRTX) by 3.9% during the third quarter. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in the pharmaceutical company, which reported mixed Q4 earnings but received multiple analyst upgrades. Insider selling was also noted, despite a generally positive outlook from analysts on revenue and pipeline diversification.

feed.title: What's that planned on Stage Road in Memphis by Captain D's?
feed.summary: A new Tractor Supply Co. store is set to open in Memphis near Bartlett this year, located at 7099 U.S. 64. The store, which specializes in agricultural products, home improvement, and pet care, is scheduled for completion in June. This will add to Tractor Supply's existing presence in the Shelby County suburbs.

feed.title: House Loses; Wynn’s Q4 Miss
feed.summary: Wynn Resorts missed its Q4 earnings expectations, reporting lower-than-anticipated earnings per share due to a streak of bad luck at its casino tables in Las Vegas and Macau, where win percentages dropped. Despite this, the company's operational engine remains strong, with significant adjusted property earnings, and it is focused on future growth with a major project in the UAE and substantial capital expenditures planned for 2026 across its global properties. Wynn maintains a solid financial foundation and is confident that its long-term strategy, particularly the UAE project, will help stabilize future earnings.

feed.title: Some have welcomed Southwest’s new seat assignment and boarding system. The airline has said research showed more people would fly the carrier if it offered assigned seats. But many are in mourning for a company that once stood out but now blends in
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines' new seat assignment and boarding system has elicited mixed reactions. While some welcome the change, believing it improves the flying experience and attracts more customers, many long-time passengers are lamenting the loss of Southwest's unique approach that once differentiated it from other airlines. This shift has led to discussions about customer service, pricing, and whether the airline is losing its distinctive brand identity.

feed.title: The five-year decline in earnings for KKR NYSE:KKR) isn't encouraging, but shareholders are still up 134% over that period
feed.summary: Despite a five-year decline in earnings, KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) shareholders have seen a total shareholder return (TSR) of 134% over that period, significantly outperforming its share price return due to dividend payments. While the company moved from a loss to profitability during this time, recent short-term performance shows a 27% drop for the year. Insider buying activity suggests a positive outlook, and a current sell-off might present a buying opportunity if fundamental data continues to show long-term sustainable growth.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare, Inc.'s (NYSE:HCA) large institutional owners must be happy as stock continues to impress, up 8.6% over the past week
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) has seen its stock price increase by 8.6% over the past week, bringing its one-year return to shareholders to 72%. Institutional investors, holding a 55% stake, are the largest ownership group and are likely pleased with this performance. While insiders have a meaningful stake worth US$1.6 billion, they have been selling shares recently, and the general public holds a 32% stake in the company.

feed.title: Diageo presses ahead with Ontario site closure despite deal
feed.summary: Diageo plans to close its Crown Royal whisky bottling facility in Amherstburg, Ontario, despite reaching a new agreement with the provincial government that allows its products to remain on sale. The company had previously warned of closure if a deal wasn't struck, but the recent agreement does not appear to have altered its decision to shut down the site. This move highlights ongoing tensions and complex negotiations between multinational corporations and regional authorities.

feed.title: Freshpet, Inc. $FRPT Stake Boosted by Public Sector Pension Investment Board
feed.summary: Public Sector Pension Investment Board increased its stake in Freshpet, Inc. by 14.5% in the third quarter, now owning 190,296 shares valued at approximately $10.49 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, showing mixed sentiment. Analyst ratings for Freshpet are primarily "Hold" with an average target price of $73.60, while an insider, President Scott James Morris, recently sold over 5,000 shares.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc. (NASDAQ:COKE) Short Interest Up 26.2% in January
feed.summary: Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc. (COKE) experienced a significant 26.2% increase in short interest in January, reaching 1,970,117 shares by January 30th. This represents a short-interest ratio of 5.8 days and indicates that 2.3% of the company's shares are currently short sold. The article also covers recent dividend announcements, institutional trading activity, and analyst ratings for COKE.

feed.title: Insiders At Texas Instruments Sold US$5.4m In Stock, Alluding To Potential Weakness
feed.summary: Over the past year, insiders at Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) sold significant amounts of stock, totaling US$5.4 million, without any corresponding purchases. This includes a recent sale of US$5.0 million worth of shares within the last three months. While insider selling can have various explanations, the lack of insider buying and the sale of shares at a price below the current market value could be a weak signal of potential weakness to investors, despite the company's profitability.

feed.title: Big Short Steve Eisman Favors Schwab, Cites Robinhood's Lack Of 'Margin For Error' Amid Bitcoin-Led Crypto Slide
feed.summary: Steve Eisman, the famed "Big Short" investor, favors Charles Schwab over Robinhood due to Robinhood's significant exposure to the volatile cryptocurrency market and its high valuation. He warns that Robinhood has "no margin for error" given its struggles with declining crypto prices, which have impacted its earnings, revenue, and net new assets. Eisman also notes that Coinbase faces similar challenges, with its stock performance directly tied to the falling crypto market.
